jobs.title: AI Application Engineer
jobs.seniority_signal: 3+ years of software engineering
jobs.summary: A rapidly growing AI SaaS company in Berlin is seeking an AI Application Engineer to build next-generation AI-powered business applications using large language models, intelligent agents, and workflow automation. The role involves designing, developing, and deploying production-ready AI solutions that improve productivity and automate complex workflows.

skills.raw_text: Experience building and deploying production AI applications
Strong understanding of modern application architecture and API development

jobs.title: AI Automation Engineer
jobs.seniority_signal: proficient in Python, n8n, and API architecture. You have hands-on experience with RAG and connecting LLMs to proprietary data sources
jobs.summary: Cosuno is looking for an AI Automation Engineer to be the driving force behind scaling efficiency by designing and implementing AI-driven workflows across the company. The role involves building a modular automation platform leveraging state-of-the-art LLMs, RAG, and orchestration tools like n8n rather than training proprietary models from scratch.

skills.raw_text: connecting LLMs to proprietary data sources

jobs.title: AI Automation Engineer (F/M/X)
jobs.seniority_signal: production-oriented LLM workflows, RAG architectures, prompt and context engineering, evaluation frameworks, security guardrails, and workflow automation; "Show ownership and initiative"
jobs.summary: Sparetech is hiring its first AI Automation Engineer to design, build, and scale AI-powered workflows and agents across the company, turning operational problems into production-ready automations. The role requires hands-on applied AI fluency including LLM workflows, RAG architectures, prompt engineering, and evaluation frameworks.

jobs.title: AI Engineer (LLM) - Remote
jobs.seniority_signal: ownership mindset; Experience integrating AI workflows into production systems
jobs.summary: Dexter Health is hiring a remote AI Engineer (LLM) to build AI-powered product features and LLM-based workflows, integrating them into production systems. The role requires strong Python engineering skills, experience with AI output evaluation, and comfort using AI development tools like Claude Code, Cursor, or Copilot.

skills.raw_text: Strong software engineering skills, especially in Python or a comparable backend language
Experience building AI-powered product features or LLM-based workflows
Strong understanding of how to design, test, validate, and improve AI outputs
Serious experience using AI development tools such as Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Copilot, or similar as part of your daily workflow
Experience with frontend or fullstack product development
Experience improving latency, cost, quality, or reliability of AI systems
Experience with healthcare software, healthcare data, or regulated environments
Experience working with structured data extraction, documentation automation, voice workflows, or workflow automation
Knowledge of nursing homes or elderly care workflows

jobs.company: IU International University of Applied Sciences

jobs.summary: IU is hiring an AI Engineer to help design and build LLM- and agent-powered backend services for Syntea, their AI-powered learning assistant. The role involves developing agentic pipelines, RAG, prompt engineering, and production-grade AI systems at scale.

jobs.title: AI Engineer | AI SaaS Platform
jobs.seniority_signal: Hands-on experience building software products with LLM integration; high ownership mentality; production-level shipping focus

agentic systems to handle complex workflows
infrastructure for evaluation, monitoring and continuous model improvement

jobs.title: AI Engineer (f/m/x)
jobs.seniority_signal: 3+ years of experience in Applied AI or Machine Learning in the industry

skills.raw_text: Cloud AI offerings on one of the Hyperscalers (GCP, AWS or Azure)

jobs.title: AI Engineer
jobs.seniority_signal: production-quality code, hands-on experience building production LLM applications
jobs.summary: Quantori is looking for a skilled AI/ML Engineer to design and implement evaluation strategies for AI agents in Databricks, contribute to MLOps workflows, and deliver client demos. The role requires strong Python, LLM/agent experience, and familiarity with core ML tooling and data stores.

skills.raw_text: Strong Python engineering skills, including writing production-quality code and tests
Experience building and integrating REST APIs (e.g., FastAPI/Flask) for AI services
Practical experience with LLM agents / agentic workflows, including state management, tool/function calling, iterative execution, and output validation/guardrails
Working knowledge of MLOps / LLMOps: experiment tracking, versioning, CI/CD for AI workflows, and deployment/monitoring basics
Experience designing evaluation and QA frameworks for LLM/agent outputs
Hands-on experience building production LLM applications and agents (RAG, multi-step reasoning, tool/function calling, MCP)
Experience with cheminformatics (e.g., molecular fingerprints, chemical descriptors, RDKit, molecular similarity search)
Experience working on healthcare or life sciences projects

jobs.title: AI Engineer
jobs.seniority_signal: production-quality agentic systems, autonomous LLM-powered agent design and implementation, "make good technical decisions with limited hand-holding"
jobs.summary: TryHackMe is hiring an AI Engineer (EMEA, Remote) to design and build autonomous LLM-powered attacker and defender agents for a cybersecurity range platform, including planning loops, tool use, prompt engineering, and agentic architecture under adversarial conditions.

skills.raw_text: LLM-powered agents — planning loops, tool use, memory, state management
Strong Python engineering; able to ship production-quality agentic systems
Ability to design prompts and agent architectures
LLMs to analyse an attack chain
Working familiarity with cybersecurity concepts — attack techniques, MITRE ATT&CK, network fundamentals
Experience with adversary emulation frameworks (MITRE CALDERA or similar)
Experience building event-driven systems that monitor and react to real-time state changes
Familiarity with cloud infrastructure (we provision VMs and networks dynamically per exercise)
Prior work in the cyber range, red team tooling, or security simulation space

jobs.title: Agentic AI Engineer

semantic search technologies (vector databases, embeddings, RAG systems)
